mapper.select:
SELECT /* BondMgmtMapper.selectSoldAssetList2Ex */ B.CONTRACT_NUM , B.SUB_LINK_NAME , FN_GET_CODENM('RCP001', B.CUSTOMER_TYPE) AS CUSTOMER_TYPE , DECODE(B.CUSTOMER_TYPE, 'I', SUBSTR(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES(B.USER_SSN),0,6), '') AS USER_SSN , B.TAX_ID , FN_GET_ORGNM(B.OPEN_AGNT_CD) AS ORGN_NM , B.SUB_ADR_PRIMARY_LN , B.SUBSCRIBER_NO , TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(B.INST_STRT_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD'), 1), 'YYYY-MM')||'-01' AS PAY_STRT_DT , TO_CHAR(LAST_DAY(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(B.INSR_TRMN_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD'), 1)), 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS PAY_END_DT , '매월말일' AS REDEEM_DT , F_GET_KT_CODE_NM('MSP_JUO_BAN_INFO', 'BL_BILLING_METHOD', B.BL_BILLING_METHOD) AS BL_BILLING_METHOD , B.TTL_INST_AMNT , 0 AS INST_INT_AMT , 0 AS INST_ETC_AMT , B.TTL_INST_AMNT + 0 + 0 AS INST_TOTAL_AMT , (SELECT YET_PYMN_AMNT FROM MSP_BOND_ASSET WHERE GRNT_INSR_MNGM_NO = A.GRNT_INSR_MNGM_NO AND BILL_YM = TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(A.SALE_YM,'YYYYMM'),-1),'YYYYMM') AND A.RTN_YM IS NULL ) AS BOND_SALE_AMT , 0 AS BOND_SALE_INT_AMT , 0 AS BOND_SALE_ETC_AMT , (SELECT YET_PYMN_AMNT FROM MSP_BOND_ASSET WHERE GRNT_INSR_MNGM_NO = A.GRNT_INSR_MNGM_NO AND BILL_YM = TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(A.SALE_YM,'YYYYMM'),-1),'YYYYMM') AND A.RTN_YM IS NULL ) + 0 + 0 AS BOND_SALE_TOTAL_AMT , B.YET_PYMN_AMNT , TRUNC(B.TTL_INST_AMNT/B.TTL_INST_MNTH_CNT,-1) AS MON_BILL , B.TTL_INST_MNTH_CNT , B.RMN_INST_CNT , B.GRNT_INSR_MNGM_NO , A.BOND_SEQ_NO FROM MSP_BOND_SALE_DTL A , MSP_BOND_ASSET B WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.GRNT_INSR_MNGM_NO = B.GRNT_INSR_MNGM_NO AND A.BOND_SEQ_NO = #{bondSeqNo} AND A.RTN_YM IS NULL AND B.MST_YN = 'Y'
ORDER BY B.OPEN_DT DESC

WITH BOND_SALE_DATA_STTC AS /* BondMgmtMapper.selectScheduledCf */ (SELECT C.YET_PYMN_AMNT AS REMAIN_AMT, C.TTL_INST_MNTH_CNT - MONTHS_BETWEEN(TO_DATE(C.BILL_YM, 'YYYYMM'), TO_DATE(SUBSTR(C.GRNT_INSR_MNGM_NO, 0, 6), 'YYYYMM')) AS REMAIN_CNT, A.SALE_YM FROM MSP_BOND_SALE_MST A, MSP_BOND_SALE_DTL B, MSP_BOND_ASSET C WHERE A.BOND_SEQ_NO = B.BOND_SEQ_NO AND B.GRNT_INSR_MNGM_NO = C.GRNT_INSR_MNGM_NO AND TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(B.SALE_YM, 'YYYYMM'), -1), 'YYYYMM') = C.BILL_YM AND B.GRNT_INSR_MNGM_NO = C.GRNT_INSR_MNGM_NO AND A.BOND_SEQ_NO = #{bondSeqNo} ) SELECT SALE_YM, SUM(MON_AMT) AS EXP_BOND_AMT FROM (SELECT SALE_YM, CASE WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-0) = 1 THEN REMAIN_AMT - ( TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) * ( REMAIN_CNT - 1 ) ) WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-0) > 1 THEN TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) ELSE 0 END AS MON_AMT FROM BOND_SALE_DATA_STTC ) GROUP BY SALE_YM UNION ALL SELECT SALE_YM, SUM(MON_AMT) AS EXP_BOND_AMT FROM (SELECT TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(SALE_YM, 'YYYYMM'), 1), 'YYYYMM') AS SALE_YM, CASE WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-1) = 1 THEN REMAIN_AMT - ( TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) * ( REMAIN_CNT - 1 ) ) WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-1) > 1 THEN TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) ELSE 0 END AS MON_AMT FROM BOND_SALE_DATA_STTC ) GROUP BY SALE_YM UNION ALL SELECT SALE_YM, SUM(MON_AMT) AS EXP_BOND_AMT FROM (SELECT TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(SALE_YM, 'YYYYMM'), 2), 'YYYYMM') AS SALE_YM, CASE WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-2) = 1 THEN REMAIN_AMT - ( TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) * ( REMAIN_CNT - 1 ) ) WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-2) > 1 THEN TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) ELSE 0 END AS MON_AMT FROM BOND_SALE_DATA_STTC ) GROUP BY SALE_YM UNION ALL SELECT SALE_YM, SUM(MON_AMT) AS EXP_BOND_AMT FROM (SELECT TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(SALE_YM, 'YYYYMM'), 3), 'YYYYMM') AS SALE_YM, CASE WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-3) = 1 THEN REMAIN_AMT - ( TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) * ( REMAIN_CNT - 1 ) ) WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-3) > 1 THEN TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) ELSE 0 END AS MON_AMT FROM BOND_SALE_DATA_STTC ) GROUP BY SALE_YM UNION ALL SELECT SALE_YM, SUM(MON_AMT) AS EXP_BOND_AMT FROM (SELECT TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(SALE_YM, 'YYYYMM'), 4), 'YYYYMM') AS SALE_YM, CASE WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-4) = 1 THEN REMAIN_AMT - ( TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) * ( REMAIN_CNT - 1 ) ) WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-4) > 1 THEN TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) ELSE 0 END AS MON_AMT FROM BOND_SALE_DATA_STTC ) GROUP BY SALE_YM UNION ALL SELECT SALE_YM, SUM(MON_AMT) AS EXP_BOND_AMT FROM (SELECT TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(SALE_YM, 'YYYYMM'), 5), 'YYYYMM') AS SALE_YM, CASE WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-5) = 1 THEN REMAIN_AMT - ( TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) * ( REMAIN_CNT - 1 ) ) WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-5) > 1 THEN TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) ELSE 0 END AS MON_AMT FROM BOND_SALE_DATA_STTC ) GROUP BY SALE_YM UNION ALL SELECT SALE_YM, SUM(MON_AMT) AS EXP_BOND_AMT FROM (SELECT TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(SALE_YM, 'YYYYMM'), 6), 'YYYYMM') AS SALE_YM, CASE WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-6) = 1 THEN REMAIN_AMT - ( TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) * ( REMAIN_CNT - 1 ) ) WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-6) > 1 THEN TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) ELSE 0 END AS MON_AMT FROM BOND_SALE_DATA_STTC ) GROUP BY SALE_YM UNION ALL SELECT SALE_YM, SUM(MON_AMT) AS EXP_BOND_AMT FROM (SELECT TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(SALE_YM, 'YYYYMM'), 7), 'YYYYMM') AS SALE_YM, CASE WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-7) = 1 THEN REMAIN_AMT - ( TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) * ( REMAIN_CNT - 1 ) ) WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-7) > 1 THEN TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) ELSE 0 END AS MON_AMT FROM BOND_SALE_DATA_STTC ) GROUP BY SALE_YM UNION ALL SELECT SALE_YM, SUM(MON_AMT) AS EXP_BOND_AMT FROM (SELECT TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(SALE_YM, 'YYYYMM'), 8), 'YYYYMM') AS SALE_YM, CASE WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-8) = 1 THEN REMAIN_AMT - ( TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) * ( REMAIN_CNT - 1 ) ) WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-8) > 1 THEN TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) ELSE 0 END AS MON_AMT FROM BOND_SALE_DATA_STTC ) GROUP BY SALE_YM UNION ALL SELECT SALE_YM, SUM(MON_AMT) AS EXP_BOND_AMT FROM (SELECT TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(SALE_YM, 'YYYYMM'), 9), 'YYYYMM') AS SALE_YM, CASE WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-9) = 1 THEN REMAIN_AMT - ( TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) * ( REMAIN_CNT - 1 ) ) WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-9) > 1 THEN TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) ELSE 0 END AS MON_AMT FROM BOND_SALE_DATA_STTC ) GROUP BY SALE_YM UNION ALL SELECT SALE_YM, SUM(MON_AMT) AS EXP_BOND_AMT FROM (SELECT TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(SALE_YM, 'YYYYMM'), 10), 'YYYYMM') AS SALE_YM, CASE WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-10) = 1 THEN REMAIN_AMT - ( TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) * ( REMAIN_CNT - 1 ) ) WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-10) > 1 THEN TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) ELSE 0 END AS MON_AMT FROM BOND_SALE_DATA_STTC ) GROUP BY SALE_YM UNION ALL SELECT SALE_YM, SUM(MON_AMT) AS EXP_BOND_AMT FROM (SELECT TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(SALE_YM, 'YYYYMM'), 11), 'YYYYMM') AS SALE_YM, CASE WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-11) = 1 THEN REMAIN_AMT - ( TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) * ( REMAIN_CNT - 1 ) ) WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-11) > 1 THEN TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) ELSE 0 END AS MON_AMT FROM BOND_SALE_DATA_STTC ) GROUP BY SALE_YM UNION ALL SELECT SALE_YM, SUM(MON_AMT) AS EXP_BOND_AMT FROM (SELECT TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(SALE_YM, 'YYYYMM'), 12), 'YYYYMM') AS SALE_YM, CASE WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-12) = 1 THEN REMAIN_AMT - ( TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) * ( REMAIN_CNT - 1 ) ) WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-12) > 1 THEN TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) ELSE 0 END AS MON_AMT FROM BOND_SALE_DATA_STTC ) GROUP BY SALE_YM UNION ALL SELECT SALE_YM, SUM(MON_AMT) AS EXP_BOND_AMT FROM (SELECT TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(SALE_YM, 'YYYYMM'), 13), 'YYYYMM') AS SALE_YM, CASE WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-13) = 1 THEN REMAIN_AMT - ( TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) * ( REMAIN_CNT - 1 ) ) WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-13) > 1 THEN TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) ELSE 0 END AS MON_AMT FROM BOND_SALE_DATA_STTC ) GROUP BY SALE_YM UNION ALL SELECT SALE_YM, SUM(MON_AMT) AS EXP_BOND_AMT FROM (SELECT TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(SALE_YM, 'YYYYMM'), 14), 'YYYYMM') AS SALE_YM, CASE WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-14) = 1 THEN REMAIN_AMT - ( TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) * ( REMAIN_CNT - 1 ) ) WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-14) > 1 THEN TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) ELSE 0 END AS MON_AMT FROM BOND_SALE_DATA_STTC ) GROUP BY SALE_YM UNION ALL SELECT SALE_YM, SUM(MON_AMT) AS EXP_BOND_AMT FROM (SELECT TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(SALE_YM, 'YYYYMM'), 15), 'YYYYMM') AS SALE_YM, CASE WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-15) = 1 THEN REMAIN_AMT - ( TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) * ( REMAIN_CNT - 1 ) ) WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-15) > 1 THEN TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) ELSE 0 END AS MON_AMT FROM BOND_SALE_DATA_STTC ) GROUP BY SALE_YM UNION ALL SELECT SALE_YM, SUM(MON_AMT) AS EXP_BOND_AMT FROM (SELECT TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(SALE_YM, 'YYYYMM'), 16), 'YYYYMM') AS SALE_YM, CASE WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-16) = 1 THEN REMAIN_AMT - ( TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) * ( REMAIN_CNT - 1 ) ) WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-16) > 1 THEN TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) ELSE 0 END AS MON_AMT FROM BOND_SALE_DATA_STTC ) GROUP BY SALE_YM UNION ALL SELECT SALE_YM, SUM(MON_AMT) AS EXP_BOND_AMT FROM (SELECT TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(SALE_YM, 'YYYYMM'), 17), 'YYYYMM') AS SALE_YM, CASE WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-17) = 1 THEN REMAIN_AMT - ( TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) * ( REMAIN_CNT - 1 ) ) WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-17) > 1 THEN TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) ELSE 0 END AS MON_AMT FROM BOND_SALE_DATA_STTC ) GROUP BY SALE_YM UNION ALL SELECT SALE_YM, SUM(MON_AMT) AS EXP_BOND_AMT FROM (SELECT TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(SALE_YM, 'YYYYMM'), 18), 'YYYYMM') AS SALE_YM, CASE WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-18) = 1 THEN REMAIN_AMT - ( TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) * ( REMAIN_CNT - 1 ) ) WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-18) > 1 THEN TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) ELSE 0 END AS MON_AMT FROM BOND_SALE_DATA_STTC ) GROUP BY SALE_YM UNION ALL SELECT SALE_YM, SUM(MON_AMT) AS EXP_BOND_AMT FROM (SELECT TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(SALE_YM, 'YYYYMM'), 19), 'YYYYMM') AS SALE_YM, CASE WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-19) = 1 THEN REMAIN_AMT - ( TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) * ( REMAIN_CNT - 1 ) ) WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-19) > 1 THEN TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) ELSE 0 END AS MON_AMT FROM BOND_SALE_DATA_STTC ) GROUP BY SALE_YM UNION ALL SELECT SALE_YM, SUM(MON_AMT) AS EXP_BOND_AMT FROM (SELECT TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(SALE_YM, 'YYYYMM'), 20), 'YYYYMM') AS SALE_YM, CASE WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-20) = 1 THEN REMAIN_AMT - ( TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) * ( REMAIN_CNT - 1 ) ) WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-20) > 1 THEN TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) ELSE 0 END AS MON_AMT FROM BOND_SALE_DATA_STTC ) GROUP BY SALE_YM UNION ALL SELECT SALE_YM, SUM(MON_AMT) AS EXP_BOND_AMT FROM (SELECT TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(SALE_YM, 'YYYYMM'), 21), 'YYYYMM') AS SALE_YM, CASE WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-21) = 1 THEN REMAIN_AMT - ( TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) * ( REMAIN_CNT - 1 ) ) WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-21) > 1 THEN TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) ELSE 0 END AS MON_AMT FROM BOND_SALE_DATA_STTC ) GROUP BY SALE_YM UNION ALL SELECT SALE_YM, SUM(MON_AMT) AS EXP_BOND_AMT FROM (SELECT TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(SALE_YM, 'YYYYMM'), 22), 'YYYYMM') AS SALE_YM, CASE WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-22) = 1 THEN REMAIN_AMT - ( TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) * ( REMAIN_CNT - 1 ) ) WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-22) > 1 THEN TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) ELSE 0 END AS MON_AMT FROM BOND_SALE_DATA_STTC ) GROUP BY SALE_YM UNION ALL SELECT SALE_YM, SUM(MON_AMT) AS EXP_BOND_AMT FROM (SELECT TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(SALE_YM, 'YYYYMM'), 23), 'YYYYMM') AS SALE_YM, CASE WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-23) = 1 THEN REMAIN_AMT - ( TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) * ( REMAIN_CNT - 1 ) ) WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-23) > 1 THEN TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) ELSE 0 END AS MON_AMT FROM BOND_SALE_DATA_STTC ) GROUP BY SALE_YM UNION ALL SELECT SALE_YM, SUM(MON_AMT) AS EXP_BOND_AMT FROM (SELECT TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(SALE_YM, 'YYYYMM'), 24), 'YYYYMM') AS SALE_YM, CASE WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-24) = 1 THEN REMAIN_AMT - ( TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) * ( REMAIN_CNT - 1 ) ) WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-24) > 1 THEN TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) ELSE 0 END AS MON_AMT FROM BOND_SALE_DATA_STTC ) GROUP BY SALE_YM UNION ALL SELECT SALE_YM, SUM(MON_AMT) AS EXP_BOND_AMT FROM (SELECT TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(SALE_YM, 'YYYYMM'), 25), 'YYYYMM') AS SALE_YM, CASE WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-25) = 1 THEN REMAIN_AMT - ( TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) * ( REMAIN_CNT - 1 ) ) WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-25) > 1 THEN TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) ELSE 0 END AS MON_AMT FROM BOND_SALE_DATA_STTC ) GROUP BY SALE_YM UNION ALL SELECT SALE_YM, SUM(MON_AMT) AS EXP_BOND_AMT FROM (SELECT TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(SALE_YM, 'YYYYMM'), 26), 'YYYYMM') AS SALE_YM, CASE WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-26) = 1 THEN REMAIN_AMT - ( TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) * ( REMAIN_CNT - 1 ) ) WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-26) > 1 THEN TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) ELSE 0 END AS MON_AMT FROM BOND_SALE_DATA_STTC ) GROUP BY SALE_YM UNION ALL SELECT SALE_YM, SUM(MON_AMT) AS EXP_BOND_AMT FROM (SELECT TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(SALE_YM, 'YYYYMM'), 27), 'YYYYMM') AS SALE_YM, CASE WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-27) = 1 THEN REMAIN_AMT - ( TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) * ( REMAIN_CNT - 1 ) ) WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-27) > 1 THEN TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) ELSE 0 END AS MON_AMT FROM BOND_SALE_DATA_STTC ) GROUP BY SALE_YM UNION ALL SELECT SALE_YM, SUM(MON_AMT) AS EXP_BOND_AMT FROM (SELECT TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(SALE_YM, 'YYYYMM'), 28), 'YYYYMM') AS SALE_YM, CASE WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-28) = 1 THEN REMAIN_AMT - ( TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) * ( REMAIN_CNT - 1 ) ) WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-28) > 1 THEN TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) ELSE 0 END AS MON_AMT FROM BOND_SALE_DATA_STTC ) GROUP BY SALE_YM UNION ALL SELECT SALE_YM, SUM(MON_AMT) AS EXP_BOND_AMT FROM (SELECT TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(SALE_YM, 'YYYYMM'), 29), 'YYYYMM') AS SALE_YM, CASE WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-29) = 1 THEN REMAIN_AMT - ( TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) * ( REMAIN_CNT - 1 ) ) WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-29) > 1 THEN TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) ELSE 0 END AS MON_AMT FROM BOND_SALE_DATA_STTC ) GROUP BY SALE_YM UNION ALL SELECT SALE_YM, SUM(MON_AMT) AS EXP_BOND_AMT FROM (SELECT TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(SALE_YM, 'YYYYMM'), 30), 'YYYYMM') AS SALE_YM, CASE WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-30) = 1 THEN REMAIN_AMT - ( TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) * ( REMAIN_CNT - 1 ) ) WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-30) > 1 THEN TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) ELSE 0 END AS MON_AMT FROM BOND_SALE_DATA_STTC ) GROUP BY SALE_YM UNION ALL SELECT SALE_YM, SUM(MON_AMT) AS EXP_BOND_AMT FROM (SELECT TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(SALE_YM, 'YYYYMM'), 31), 'YYYYMM') AS SALE_YM, CASE WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-31) = 1 THEN REMAIN_AMT - ( TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) * ( REMAIN_CNT - 1 ) ) WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-31) > 1 THEN TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) ELSE 0 END AS MON_AMT FROM BOND_SALE_DATA_STTC ) GROUP BY SALE_YM UNION ALL SELECT SALE_YM, SUM(MON_AMT) AS EXP_BOND_AMT FROM (SELECT TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(SALE_YM, 'YYYYMM'), 32), 'YYYYMM') AS SALE_YM, CASE WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-32) = 1 THEN REMAIN_AMT - ( TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) * ( REMAIN_CNT - 1 ) ) WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-32) > 1 THEN TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) ELSE 0 END AS MON_AMT FROM BOND_SALE_DATA_STTC ) GROUP BY SALE_YM UNION ALL SELECT SALE_YM, SUM(MON_AMT) AS EXP_BOND_AMT FROM (SELECT TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(SALE_YM, 'YYYYMM'), 33), 'YYYYMM') AS SALE_YM, CASE WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-33) = 1 THEN REMAIN_AMT - ( TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) * ( REMAIN_CNT - 1 ) ) WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-33) > 1 THEN TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) ELSE 0 END AS MON_AMT FROM BOND_SALE_DATA_STTC ) GROUP BY SALE_YM UNION ALL SELECT SALE_YM, SUM(MON_AMT) AS EXP_BOND_AMT FROM (SELECT TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(SALE_YM, 'YYYYMM'), 34), 'YYYYMM') AS SALE_YM, CASE WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-34) = 1 THEN REMAIN_AMT - ( TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) * ( REMAIN_CNT - 1 ) ) WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-34) > 1 THEN TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) ELSE 0 END AS MON_AMT FROM BOND_SALE_DATA_STTC ) GROUP BY SALE_YM UNION ALL SELECT SALE_YM, SUM(MON_AMT) AS EXP_BOND_AMT FROM (SELECT TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(SALE_YM, 'YYYYMM'), 35), 'YYYYMM') AS SALE_YM, CASE WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-35) = 1 THEN REMAIN_AMT - ( TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) * ( REMAIN_CNT - 1 ) ) WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-35) > 1 THEN TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) ELSE 0 END AS MON_AMT FROM BOND_SALE_DATA_STTC ) GROUP BY SALE_YM

SELECT /* BondMgmtMapper.selectSoldBondStaticInfoList */
B.SALE_NO , A.* , YET_PYMN_AMNT + REAL_PYMN_AMNT + MID_PRFPAY_AMNT + ADJS_AMNT AS MNTH_FST_AMT , (INSR_BILL_AMNT - INSR_PYMN_AMNT) AS INSR_MTG_AMT , 0 AS INSR_BCK_INT_AMT , BOND_CNT - NR_FULL_PRFPAY_CNT - NR_PYMN_CNT - INSR_PYMN_CNT - NR_RTN_CNT AS MNTH_LST_CNT , NVL((SELECT UNPAY_ARRS_AMNT FROM MSP_BOND_SALE_STTC WHERE BILL_YM = TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(A.BILL_YM, 'YYYYMM'), -1), 'YYYYMM') AND BOND_SEQ_NO = A.BOND_SEQ_NO ),0) AS DLY_BILL_AMT FROM MSP_BOND_SALE_STTC A , MSP_BOND_SALE_MST B WHERE A.BOND_SEQ_NO = B.BOND_SEQ_NO
AND A.BOND_SEQ_NO = #{bondSeqNo}
ORDER BY A.BOND_SEQ_NO, A.BILL_YM ASC

SELECT /* BondSaleMapper.selectSoldReceiptByMonth */ '1' AS OD, '합계' AS GRNT_INSR_MNGM_NO, SUM(A.YET_PYMN_AMNT + A.REAL_PYMN_AMNT + A.MID_PRFPAY_AMNT + A.GRNT_INSR_AMNT + A.ADJS_AMNT) AS PRV_YET_PYMN_AMNT, NULL AS INST_CNT, SUM(A.BILL_AMNT) AS BILL_AMNT, SUM(A.PYMN_AMNT) AS PYMN_AMNT, SUM(A.UNPAY_AMNT) AS UNPAY_AMNT, SUM(CASE WHEN A.UNPAY_ARRS_AMNT - B.UNPAY_ARRS_AMNT > 0 THEN A.UNPAY_ARRS_AMNT - B.UNPAY_ARRS_AMNT ELSE 0 END) AS TO_UNPAY_ARRS_AMNT, SUM(A.UNPAY_ARRS_AMNT) AS UNPAY_ARRS_AMNT, NULL AS UNPAY_ARRS_TMSCNT, SUM(CASE WHEN A.MID_PRFPAY_AMNT > 0 AND A.YET_PYMN_AMNT = 0 THEN A.MID_PRFPAY_AMNT ELSE 0 END) AS FULL_PRFPAY_AMNT, SUM(CASE WHEN A.MID_PRFPAY_AMNT > 0 AND A.YET_PYMN_AMNT > 0 THEN A.MID_PRFPAY_AMNT ELSE 0 END) AS MID_PRFPAY_AMNT, SUM(A.GRNT_INSR_AMNT) AS GRNT_INSR_AMNT, SUM(A.ADJS_AMNT) AS ADJS_AMNT, SUM(CASE WHEN A.UNPAY_ARRS_FEE_AMNT - B.UNPAY_ARRS_FEE_AMNT + B.ARRS_FEE_AMNT > 0 THEN A.UNPAY_ARRS_FEE_AMNT - B.UNPAY_ARRS_FEE_AMNT + B.ARRS_FEE_AMNT ELSE 0 END) AS ARRS_FEE_INV_AMNT, SUM(A.ARRS_FEE_AMNT) AS ARRS_FEE_AMNT, SUM(B.YET_PYMN_AMNT - A.YET_PYMN_AMNT) AS DSC_AMNT, SUM(A.REAL_PYMN_AMNT + A.GRNT_INSR_AMNT + A.MID_PRFPAY_AMNT + A.ADJS_AMNT + A.ARRS_FEE_AMNT) AS REAL_PYMN_AMNT, SUM(A.YET_PYMN_AMNT) AS YET_PYMN_AMNT FROM MSP_BOND_ASSET A, MSP_BOND_ASSET B, MSP_BOND_SALE_DTL C WHERE 1 = 1 AND C.GRNT_INSR_MNGM_NO = A.GRNT_INSR_MNGM_NO AND A.GRNT_INSR_MNGM_NO = B.GRNT_INSR_MNGM_NO AND A.BILL_YM = TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(B.BILL_YM, 'YYYYMM'), 1), 'YYYYMM') AND C.BOND_SEQ_NO = #{bondSeqNo} AND A.BILL_YM = #{billYm} UNION ALL SELECT '2' AS OD, A.GRNT_INSR_MNGM_NO, A.YET_PYMN_AMNT + A.REAL_PYMN_AMNT + A.MID_PRFPAY_AMNT + A.GRNT_INSR_AMNT + A.ADJS_AMNT AS PRV_YET_PYMN_AMNT, CASE WHEN A.TTL_INST_MNTH_CNT - A.RMN_INST_CNT > 0 THEN ABS(A.TTL_INST_MNTH_CNT - A.RMN_INST_CNT) ELSE 0 END AS INST_CNT, A.BILL_AMNT, A.PYMN_AMNT, A.UNPAY_AMNT, CASE WHEN A.UNPAY_ARRS_AMNT - B.UNPAY_ARRS_AMNT > 0 THEN A.UNPAY_ARRS_AMNT - B.UNPAY_ARRS_AMNT ELSE 0 END AS TO_UNPAY_ARRS_AMNT, A.UNPAY_ARRS_AMNT, A.UNPAY_ARRS_TMSCNT, CASE WHEN A.MID_PRFPAY_AMNT > 0 AND A.YET_PYMN_AMNT = 0 THEN A.MID_PRFPAY_AMNT ELSE 0 END AS FULL_PRFPAY_AMNT, CASE WHEN A.MID_PRFPAY_AMNT > 0 AND A.YET_PYMN_AMNT > 0 THEN A.MID_PRFPAY_AMNT ELSE 0 END AS MID_PRFPAY_AMNT, A.GRNT_INSR_AMNT, A.ADJS_AMNT, CASE WHEN A.UNPAY_ARRS_FEE_AMNT - B.UNPAY_ARRS_FEE_AMNT + B.ARRS_FEE_AMNT > 0 THEN A.UNPAY_ARRS_FEE_AMNT - B.UNPAY_ARRS_FEE_AMNT + B.ARRS_FEE_AMNT ELSE 0 END AS ARRS_FEE_INV_AMNT, A.ARRS_FEE_AMNT, B.YET_PYMN_AMNT - A.YET_PYMN_AMNT AS DSC_AMNT, A.REAL_PYMN_AMNT + A.GRNT_INSR_AMNT + A.MID_PRFPAY_AMNT + A.ADJS_AMNT + A.ARRS_FEE_AMNT AS REAL_PYMN_AMNT, A.YET_PYMN_AMNT FROM MSP_BOND_ASSET A, MSP_BOND_ASSET B, MSP_BOND_SALE_DTL C WHERE 1 = 1 AND C.GRNT_INSR_MNGM_NO = A.GRNT_INSR_MNGM_NO AND A.GRNT_INSR_MNGM_NO = B.GRNT_INSR_MNGM_NO AND A.BILL_YM = TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(B.BILL_YM, 'YYYYMM'), 1), 'YYYYMM') AND C.BOND_SEQ_NO = #{bondSeqNo} AND A.BILL_YM = #{billYm} ORDER BY OD
